raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pehz ilgu Laiku fazzija
tas KUNgS uhs manni: Zellees/
etj pee ta Wratta/ un nemin to
Johstu no turrenes/ ko es tev ef-
nun patwehlejs tur apflehpt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahju es pee ta
Wratta/ un rakfu/ un jehnu to
Johstu no tahs Weetas/ kur es
to biju apsflehpis/ un raugi/ ta
Johsta bija maitata/ un ne der-
reja wairs ne ko leeti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad notiffe ta KUNGA
Wahrds uhs manni/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Tapatt maitaschu es to Lepnthu
Juha/ un to leetu Lepnibu Je-
rusalemes,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schee nikni Laudie/ kas
mannus Wahrds ne gribb klaus-
sht/ un staiga pehz sawas Sirgs
Prahta / un dsennahs zitteem
Deeveem pakkat / ka tee wiꞥ-
neem kalpo/ un preekſch winneem
Hannahs/ tee buhs ta fchi Joh-
sta/ kas wiffai leeti ne derr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ka weena Johsta pee-
ſthp pee teem Gurneem weena
Wihra/ ta eſinu es wiffu Israe-
ta Nammu/ un wiffu Nanunu
Juha man lizzis peeleipt / fa-
ka tas KUNGS: Ka tee man
buhtu par Laudim/ un par wee-
nu Wahrdn / un par teizamu
Slawa/ un par Sohdibu/ bet
tee ne irr klaufiſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz fakki fcho Wahr-
du uhs teem : Ta fakka tas
KUNGS/ tas Israeta Deeus:
Wiffas Blafckes taps ar Wiḣ-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "nu pilditas. Tad fazzihg tee uhs
tewim: Woj tad mehs to ne sin-
nam/ ka wiffas Blafckes ar
Wihnu taps pilditas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew buhs uhs winneem
fazzibt: Ta fakka tas KUNgS:
Reds/ es gribbu wiffus fchahe
Semunes Eedshwotajus/ ir patt
tohs Kehnizus/ kaſ-us Dahwi-
da Sohda-Krehflu tehſch/ un tohs
Preesterus / un tohs Prawee-
ſchus/ un wiffus Jerusalemes
Eedshwotajus ar Peedserſchanu
pildiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es gribbu weenu ar
ohtru / tik labbi to Tehwit ka
tohs Behrnuß koypa iſkaisiht /
fakka tas KUNGS: Es ne grib-
bu faudſcht/ nedg taupiht/ nedg
aptſchehlotess/ ka es winnus ne
maitatu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Klansajt/ un jemmeet weh-
rā/ ne pa-augstinajtes/ jo tas
KUNGS irr to runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Dohdeet tum KUNGam
juhtn Deewam Sohdu / pirns
tumſch mettahs/ un pirns juh-
tas Rahjas dauiſees pee teem
Kalneem tahs Pakrehlibas/ ka
juhs us Gaifmu gatdiſeet / un
wiſsch to par Nahwes Ehnu dar-
rihs/ un par Krehlibu liks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja tad juhs wehl to ne
gribbat klausibt / tad randahs
mannu Dwehſele patſeptas Wee-
tas tahs Lepnibas deht. Un man-
nas Azzis istees gauschas Affa-
ras/ un ar Affarabu notezzehs/
tadeht ka ta KUNGA gaanams
Bults irv Zectuma atswests.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
